CustomField.description: Org default (#verification): when true and email verification is required, the signing page skips the "type your email" step and sends the one-time code straight to the signer's known address. The code still goes only to the real inbox, so this is a UX shortcut, not a security change. Default false preserves the historical typed-email flow.
CustomField.label: Pre-fill Signer Email (Signatures)
